subjects.description: A white robotic arm with black joints and cables holding a small light-green pitcher
subjects.appearance_details: Sleek white finish with visible mechanical joints, gripper holding a translucent pitcher containing clear liquid
subjects.relationship: Central subject performing a precision pouring task above a glass on the table
subjects.orientation: Extended forward, slightly tilted to pour
subjects.action: Carefully pouring liquid into a glass

subjects.description: A clear glass partially filled with a reddish-brown liquid on a white tabletop
subjects.appearance_details: Transparent glass with a metal spoon inside, reddish-brown liquid filling the lower half
subjects.relationship: Target vessel receiving the liquid poured by the robot arm

background_setting: A clean, modern indoor setting with a white table surface and soft ambient lighting. A vase with white flowers and a brown couch are partially visible in the background.

lighting.shadows: Soft shadows cast on the white tabletop

aesthetics.composition: Medium close-up emphasizing the robot gripper and the glass
aesthetics.color_scheme: Clean whites and grays with warm accent tones from the liquid and background

cinematography.camera_angle: Slightly above eye-level looking down at the table
